insights.title: Builder Theme: The AI Model Built for What LLMs Can't Do
insights.summary: AI & I by Every 播客 围绕「Builder Theme: The AI Model Built for What LLMs Can't Do」展开长谈，核心信号是 Speaker 1 | 00:00 - 00:01 Can you define EBM for us? Speaker 2 | 00:01 - 00:20 EBMs are naturally non autoregressive. There are no sequences of tokens, and that's what makes it fu...。对 builder 来说，重要的不是逐段复述，而是识别哪些能力已经足以重写现有协作流程。
insights.take: 长对话最适合提炼成产品判断和执行清单。优先记录其中反复出现的约束、能力边界和组织变化，再决定哪些值得在本周实验。

insights.title: Builder Theme: Josh Woodward on Introducing Gemini on Mac. We heard your feedback. We recruited a sma...
insights.summary: 社区讨论聚焦于 Josh Woodward 在 X 上的讨论 的最新信号：Introducing Gemini on Mac. We heard your feedback. We recruited a small team. They built 100+ features in less than 100 days. 🤯 100% native Swift. Lightning fast. Let us know wha...。这类一线表达更适合拿来判断 builder 叙事是否正在从概念走向可执行工作流。
insights.take: 把高信号推文当作需求和分发雷达，而不是结论本身。真正要落地的是：这背后暴露了哪些 API、工作流、部署和商业模式会率先被重写。

insights.title: Builder Theme: Guillermo Rauch on This is what the future of design looks like. Not just this specific...
insights.summary: 社区讨论聚焦于 Guillermo Rauch 在 X 上的讨论 的最新信号：This is what the future of design looks like. Not just this specific tool¹, but the fact that every team in the world is now is empowered to build their own 'design factory'. Shad...。这类一线表达更适合拿来判断 builder 叙事是否正在从概念走向可执行工作流。
insights.take: 把高信号推文当作需求和分发雷达，而不是结论本身。真正要落地的是：这背后暴露了哪些 API、工作流、部署和商业模式会率先被重写。
